plugins.name: html-to-elementor
plugins.description: Reproduce an existing HTML webpage as pixel-exact, editable Elementor custom widgets in one WordPress plugin — fonts, spacing, colors, and all animations/interactions intact. Per-section editable widgets, full-page assembly, and a GitHub auto-updater.

plugins.name: html-to-elementor-pro
plugins.description: Reproduce an existing HTML webpage as pixel-exact, editable Elementor custom widgets bundled in one WordPress plugin — fonts, spacing, colors, AND all animations/interactions intact (hovers, scroll-reveal, sliders, keyframes, JS). Lifts the source code verbatim rather than re-deriving; per-section editable widgets; full-page assembly; private-repo GitHub auto-updater.
